title: Tangy Tender Thai Brown Rice Noodle Stir-fry
description: A tangy and tender post-workout dish featuring brown rice noodles that are perfect for quick meals.
instructions: Rinse the brown rice noodles and soak them in hot water for about 5 minutes or until they are tender. Drain well.
In a small bowl, whisk together soy sauce and fish sauce; set aside.
Heat oil in a wok or large skillet over medium-high heat. Add the soaked rice noodles, red pepper flakes, green onion, and julienned bell peppers.
Pour the soy sauce mixture into the pan and stir-fry for about 2 minutes until the liquid is absorbed and the vegetables are slightly tender.
Stir in the chopped cilantro and remove from heat.
